h9468481bgcdcbg46e0ga650g4169b3188212: Changed your mind yet? I don't think either of us has the luxury of time - not against what we're facing.
h960c08acg2ddcg4999g81d6g9d375265cdba: You need me at your side.
hfea685c1g5713g41eagba5fg8ff44a1356a4: Yes... you're someone I can deal with, I think. I felt it in your head.
hbc44d431g49f1g4124g81e6g9e02edbc7fa1: We both have the same problem - the parasites. You won't make it much farther without me. I have an artefact that can protect us until we find a cure.
h060d6016g094bg46bdgaf07gc8ebacd3a3b8: You need me with you. Let me speak to your leader, and we can press on.
h9fee7ac2g7cc1g4e88gb3edg2911db1af901: You're lucky I managed to catch up with you when I did - we're both lucky, in fact.
h319987c0gc237g4cfegb9ffgc794ed027882: I'm Shadowheart - we were on the nautiloid together. We've both got the same problem... though only I might have the solution.
ha92e421egd199g466cg9ad6g3152ec94e2dc: I don't know how, but this artefact is protecting me from whoever controls our parasites. You won't get much farther without it shielding you, trust me.
h4fb23672g219fg444ega1a3g6040dc886168: If that thing's protecting you, why do you need me?
ha60f1f00ge837g425fg9046g94ebc480e407: The artefact is being hunted, and so I'm being hunted. The Absolute's forces want it. Githyanki raiders want it.
h279182aeg8938g4585gbfd0g24f77b2e8e86: I can't afford to get rid of it, but I can't protect it alone either. I'm lucky to have made it this far.
hadebb8a8gb551g4055g9e8fgb35d4e6c86e1: So it is you the kith'raki come for? This artefact is valuable - the knights will be relentless in their pursuit.
h449dae9eg86cfg4fd4gadc6gb1b12a4fcc82: So we help each other? Sounds reasonable.
h7017941bgb0e7g4126g852cgc0a1cee8c84a: Very. So what do you say?
h68695f0cg5594g400cgb609g7f1e0f69dec1: Wait. Perhaps we shouldn't. You're not the one I need to talk to, are you? Not really.
hb70f8c78g220dg4b4dga4e9g8571ecf983aa: I can feel it, in your head. You follow someone else's orders. I'll deal with them, not you.
h8e258539g02cbg401eg8358g3d02c95f6365: Fine - wait here. I'll fetch someone to talk to you.
ha6ec9830g0702g4766g99eag60b580cf7c84: Make it fast. And don't even think of venturing far without me, or it'll be your last bad decision.
h0e05c130g3a4ag4672g8a29ge5b2dc26e349: Bring whoever leads you to speak to me. Then maybe you'll have a hope of survival.
hae2eac36g0a54g490dg971fg44b15ef7197c: You know, I think I'd rather take my chances without you.
hb7bfecd0g8e44g49cdg8b0fg434fb1f22ffe: There's no chances without me - only certain death, or worse.
h19cad96fgeb8fg4b6cgabfdg3a6634784eba: I don't need to deal with you - I just need the artefact. Hand it over.
hbe046818gc114g4734gbbd9g5bfc38ac3cd8: Damn. We could have helped each other. So be it.
h3468fdbcg59e9g461agba43g73e10e656cf5: You seem overburdened with hangers-on already.
h3f413093gd5c3g4d4dg82e7g1ecb5d05023f: I'll mark my camp on your map. You can rest there.
h5930311agdf6dg424ag9942g74263eedb6a6: Fine. Just stay safe. We need each other.
h54018c04g45fbg4276g921cg0efa750cf961: Looks like you're out of luck then.
h29741a80g837bg409eg936fgfcbfe34fcad2: No - either we join forces, or you don't go anywhere. Tell me where to find your camp at least.
h960c776ag13f5g4833gb547gdaa2c50cdc89: All right, I'll mark your map.
hd1cc3303gc6bdg4e66gafc8gb3c163297c86: You're not going anywhere with me, but I'll take that artefact.
h0ab4df1eg16deg40bfg942agbe962b412c56: No! The artefact stays with me. And I'll do whatever's necessary to protect it, if I can't make you see reason.
h3176a0d5gf19cg4791gbf9bg13b6f6235836: Fine, you can come with me.
hbf076599g34c8g433bg9c1cgb0c06f9ca1d7: Why do you need me so badly?
h3dff5d4bg9b14g4f47g8cdag9740410491e6: Why do you have this to begin with?
h16c74da2g0d0dg4c98gb49dg68a365f6533f: Never mind how I got it - just be glad I have it. For now, let's just help each other. What do you say?
hcf4bd3ceg67ccg4964gaf48g14ba937928f6: I'll take the box, but I don't need you.
hb234ec7eg9a8ag4ae0g8888g1adabb3be644: It stays with me - I'll kill to protect it. Already have.
h93531024g85feg4faegb361gebedf2dfc785: If my people want that artefact, then I should take it from you, not join you.
h24005405gaa02g4f4dg9cefg46839830da23: That wouldn't be wise. Even if you managed to get it off of me, do you really think your kin would welcome you with open arms?
h54dbb8f3gac6fg4bfcg8a42g3e73310ebfed: You're infected - they'll just put you down like a rabid animal. Your best chance is with me.
hffe98bc8g9e9fg4db4g903ega68e0b03b0c0: Fine - but where do I fit into this?
h0d5e873ag3ed9g4518gbeacg6aee9c85c11b: I'll take my chances without you. Clear off.
h8cd94518g437fg409bgb198g052d6202e335: I'll wait here, until you come to your senses. For both our sakes, I hope that happens very soon.
h22038108ga916g4bddg8943gd6e0624de740: How generous. What aren't you telling me?
h8cece81ag4c7ag4a4fg98c0ga47d973e4d85: Sounds like it's that artefact I need, not you.
h8970bed1g2156g4db6g9a34g53639e1d3be3: You'd better start making a lot more sense very rapidly.
he2f3df0eg5b7bg446ega9fdg793581bf6e6e: That voice you just felt? It's because of what was done to us - the infection.
h3227bd63ge714g48d3gbda7g839fc876a461: That artefact looks githyanki - why do you have it?
had4f8c0dg5082g40dfgb26dgc5ab7332a80c: That doesn't matter - what matters is how it can help us against the monsters in our heads.
h6bb72142gbaf4g408bga20ag9618e96221d2: I don't know what just happened, but keep away from me.
hd2fe5497g730fg4d71g93a8g0eb13da3e75d: Hear me out - your life depends on it. We've both got the same problem... though only I might have the solution.
